candidate_definition_hints.text: Utilities for working with native solc and compiling projects.

Archived as a standalone repository. Maintenance and publishing continue from [`foundry-core`](https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry-core) under the same [`foundry-compilers`](https://crates.io/crates/foundry-compilers) crate name.
